label: personal_cloud_sync_ip_staging
description: Fred Rocba's host contains personal cloud-sync infrastructure and SRL-relevant documents consistent with IP staging or exfiltration risk.

killers.name: no_personal_cloud_sync_artifacts
killers.description: If no personal cloud-sync folder, installer, or execution artifact is present, the cloud-sync staging hypothesis fails.

killers.name: no_srl_relevant_document_names
killers.description: If no SRL-relevant or IP-like document names appear in the cloud-sync evidence, the IP-staging hypothesis fails.

label: single_source_cloud_claims_should_not_be_confirmed
description: Cloud-sync claims must not remain CONFIRMED when only one independent artifact source supports them.

killers.name: single_source_claims_exist
killers.pattern: (sensitive_file\.in_cloud|OneDrive cloud sync|File present in Google Drive folder)
killers.description: This is a control hypothesis: if single-source cloud claims are present, the hypothesis that all cloud claims are multi-source is falsified and staging must cap them.

label: credential_theft
description: Attacker or insider extracted credentials from Rocba's workstation via a credential-harvesting tool or LSASS dump. If no such tool or process artifact is present in Prefetch or disk evidence, the hypothesis fails.

killers.name: no_credential_harvest_tool
killers.description: If no credential-harvesting tool or LSASS-related artifact is present in Prefetch or disk evidence, the credential theft hypothesis is not supported by the available evidence.

label: lateral_movement
description: An attacker moved laterally to or from Rocba's workstation using remote-execution tools or protocols. If no remote-execution or lateral-movement artifact is found, the hypothesis fails.

killers.name: no_remote_execution_artifact
killers.description: If no remote-execution tool or protocol artifact is found in Prefetch or event-log evidence, lateral movement from or to this host is not supported by disk evidence alone.
